channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Rectal cancer rates are rising in U.S., driving an increase in illness in younger adults - NBC News
item.description:
1. Rectal cancer rates are rising in U.S., driving an increase in illness in younger adults  NBC News
  2. Half of Colorectal Cancer Cases Now Occur in Those Under 65, Study Shows  The New York Times
  3. Rectal cancer is on the rise. Here's how it's affecting young people.  USA Today
  4. A new report reveals that a third of colon cancer cases now occur in the rectum. Take these steps to protect yourself at any age.  Business Insider
  5. Colorectal Cancer Prevention Happens Beyond Colonoscopy  Medscape

item.source: Colorado Department of Public Health and Environment (.gov)

item.title: GLP-1s may increase risk of osteoporosis and gout, new research finds - NBC News
item.description:
1. GLP-1s may increase risk of osteoporosis and gout, new research finds  NBC News

  4. GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic and Wegovy may be linked to a slightly higher risk of these illnesses  Audacy
  5. GLP-1 Use Associated with Lower Osteoporosis Risk in Adults with Type 2 Diabetes but Higher Risk in Adults Without Diabetes  Epic Research
